### 🐛 Describe the bug

```bash
INFO 04-22 15:53:32 utils.py:580] Found nccl from library libnccl.so.2
ldd: ./libnccl.so.2: No such file or directory
ERROR 04-22 15:53:32 pynccl.py:44] Failed to load NCCL library from libnccl.so.2 .It is expected if you are not running on NVIDIA/AMD GPUs.Otherwise, the nccl library might not exist, be corrupted or it does not support the current platform Linux-4.18.0-240.el8.x86_64-x86_64-with-glibc2.35.One solution is to download libnccl2 version 2.18 from https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/repos/ and extract the libnccl.so.2 file. If you already have the library, please set the environment variable VLLM_NCCL_SO_PATH to point to the correct nccl library path.
INFO 04-22 15:53:32 pynccl_utils.py:17] Failed to import NCCL library: Failed to load NCCL library from libnccl.so.2 .
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153] Error executing method init_device. This might cause deadlock in distributed execution.
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153] Traceback (most recent call last):
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]   File "/root/anaconda3/envs/vllm/lib/python3.10/site-packages/vllm/worker/worker_base.py", line 145, in execute_method
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]     return executor(*args, **kwargs)
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]   File "/root/anaconda3/envs/vllm/lib/python3.10/site-packages/vllm/worker/worker.py", line 110, in init_device
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]     init_worker_distributed_environment(self.parallel_config, self.rank,
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]   File "/root/anaconda3/envs/vllm/lib/python3.10/site-packages/vllm/worker/worker.py", line 301, in init_worker_distributed_environment
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]     pynccl_utils.init_process_group(
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]   File "/root/anaconda3/envs/vllm/lib/python3.10/site-packages/vllm/distributed/device_communicators/pynccl_utils.py", line 45, in init_process_group
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153]     logger.info(f"vLLM is using nccl=={ncclGetVersion()}")
ERROR 04-22 15:53:33 worker_base.py:153] NameError: name 'ncclGetVersion' is not defined
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/workspace/dev/vipdev/triton/benchmarks/vllm/benchmark_prefix_caching.py", line 268, in <module>
    main(args)
```
Already found Found nccl from library libnccl.so.2(the one in official NGC image) but ldd ./libnccl.so.2 failed.
```bash
INFO 04-22 15:53:32 utils.py:580] Found nccl from library libnccl.so.2
ldd: ./libnccl.so.2: No such file or directory
```
pr_title: [Core][Distributed] use absolute path for library file
pr_body:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/4155 adds integrity check for nccl library by `ldd`, which causes problem for rocm: `ldd` requires full path of library. Therefore, we need to find full path of the library.

Should fix https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/4257 .
